mission.title: kubevirt: GPU and vGPU support for Kubevirt VMs
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:
These are changes to pull pci ids or mdev uuid from the environment variable set by device plugin and create appropriate hostdev devices in libvirt VM xml.

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes** *(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will close the issue(s) when PR gets merged)*:
Fixes #2585

**Special notes for your reviewer**:

**Release note**:

```release-note
Provides ability to request Nvidia GPU and vGPU exposed by Nvidia Kubevirt Device Plugin.
```

resolution.summary:
What about the "devices.kubernetes.io" or "devices.kubevirt.io" vendor name?

In the email thread it was discussed to define an interface (env vars and
behavior) that DPs will need to implement in order to work with the device
passthrough impl in kubevirt.
And we'd expect that devices requested with "devices.kubevirt.io" (or "
gpu.devices.kubevirt.io") will implement the defined interface.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
